LongParameterList:Track2.kt$Track2$( public val pan: Pan, /** * Card expiry month. Two-digit year is mapped to 21st century * (`YY` ⇒ `20YY`); cards expiring in 2100 or later would be * mis-mapped — out of scope for this milestone. */ public val expiry: YearMonth, public val serviceCode: ServiceCode, private val discretionary: String, )
